active_profile_source: S10/S11 candidate returns plus active paper profile and S04-S08 controls; no global venue/profile default
producer_return_obligations: integrated manuscript candidate and validator report without a structured trace index
downstream_design_force: S13 reviews a structured S12 object with structured trace ledger rather than a PDF or prose blob
S14 receives integration_findings/backflow_queue with nearest-stage hints
S16 and RenderedManuscriptAuditGate can reject export/readiness claims if S12 trace/audit closure is missing

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: module inventory or critical consistency/backflow audit is missing
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: integrated candidate overclaims readiness, hides stale material, or lacks actionable findings
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local manifest, trace label, or wording issue without consistency/authority drift
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: reviewer-risk signal tracked for S13 without forced full integration rerun

nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S12 owns integration/consistency and trace-index defects; source candidate defects route to S10/S11 or upstream controls by material source.
anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR/WATCH integration polish does not force S10/S11 regeneration unless the trace, claim, stale, or consistency audit shows substantive failure.
